# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1  # Define API version (v1) in Kubernetes YAML files  
kind: Deployment    # Kind of resource to create, here is a deployment for our application's containers    
metadata:          # Metadata about the object. In this case we are giving it an name and labels     
  name: my-app       # Name (unique) identifier in Kubernetes cluster  
spec:              # Specification of what to do with resource   
  replicas: '3'     # Number of pods that should be running at the same time. In this case, we want three instances for our application     
  selector:         # Selector is a label query over Pods   (default &lt;app>/<version>) to find all relevant Pods    and select them as part of Deployment's specification    
    matchLabels:       
       app: my-app          # Label key, the name we gave our application in Kubernetes cluster     
  template:         # Template for pod creation. This is where you specify how to create Pod(s) with your image and other configurations   (specified as YAML/JSON objects here).    The container defined inside this block will be used by all replicas of the Deployment    
    metadata:        # Metadata about each individual object in Kubernetes cluster     
       labels:          # Labels to identify our application's pod(s)   (default &lt;app>/<version>, for example my-fastmoving_dev.my-app). This is used by the Deployment controller and must match with your app name in Kubernetes cluster     
         app: my-app       # Label key     The label we gave our application's pod(s)   (default &lt;app>/<version>  for example,  fastmoving_dev.my-fastmoving). This is used by the Deployment controller and must match with your labels in Kubernetes cluster     
    spec:            # Specification of how to create Pod or ReplicaSet   (specified as YAML/JSON objects here)    
       containers:  # Containers run on each pod. Here we specify that our application's container should always pull the latest image from Docker Hub     
         - name: my-app    # Name of this particular Pod, in Kubernetes cluster   (default &lt;pod>/<container>  for example  fastmoving_dev.my-fastmoving)    
           image: 'dockerhubusername/imageName'# Docker Hub Image to pull from     
           imagePullPolicy: Always # Pulls the latest version of this container every time it is run, in Kubernetes cluster   (default &lt;policy> for existing images). In our case we want always new versions.
